steps.title: Download iNaturalist OR click on iNaturalist webpage
steps.instruction: Download iNaturalist OR click on iNaturalist webpage

steps.title: Create an account OR sign in to existing account
steps.instruction: Create an account OR sign in to existing account

steps.title: Navigate to "community" - "projects" in...
steps.instruction: Navigate to "community" - "projects" in iNaturalist on a computer OR "menu" - "projects" on a smartphone

steps.title: Search for your classes iNat project title (ex
steps.instruction: Search for your classes iNat project title (ex. Mo'orea ISP 2027) and join the project

steps.title: Take pictures that you would like to upload
steps.instruction: Take pictures that you would like to upload. Make sure its a clear photo.

steps.title: To upload photos in the iNaturalist...
steps.instruction: To upload photos in the iNaturalist app press the camera icon, then either take a photo or select the library icon and choose a desired image from your photos

steps.title: Select "upload now" and the observation...
steps.instruction: Select "upload now" and the observation will be published to your account and into the class project folder

steps.title: Follow prompts on the screen to...
steps.instruction: Follow prompts on the screen to add location and species name
